name: Instagram Reels → Google Sheets / Reels→谷歌表格

nodes.name: Run and Get Results / 运行并取结果
Normalize & Score / 标准化与评分
Append Rows to Sheet / 追加到表格

parameters.content:
## Instagram Reels → Google Sheets

Scrape reels from a profile via CoreClaw, score each by engagement (likes/followers ratio + comments + plays), append to the **Reels** sheet.

Edit **Input Config**: profile URL, max reels, optional date range.

Bind credentials:
- CoreClaw API (Run node)
- Google Sheets OAuth2 (Append node)

main.node: Run and Get Results / 运行并取结果
Normalize & Score / 标准化与评分
Append Rows to Sheet / 追加到表格
